items.name: BBQ Pulled Pork Tray

items.name: Grilled Chicken Tray
items.description: Herb-marinated grilled chicken, sliced for easy serving. Lean protein tray — serves 10.

items.name: Smoked Beef Brisket Tray
items.description: 12-hour smoked Texas brisket with rich bark and smoke ring. Premium crowd tray — serves 12.

items.description: House-made meatballs in marinara. Serves 15.

items.name: Grilled Veggie Fajita Tray
items.description: Peppers, onions, and veggies with tortillas and pico.

items.name: Creamy Mac & Cheese
items.description: Three-cheese baked mac, golden and creamy. Serves 15.

items.name: Fresh Garden Salad
items.description: Mixed greens, cucumber, tomato, house vinaigrette.

items.name: Classic Coleslaw
items.description: Creamy cabbage slaw — the perfect BBQ side.

items.name: Roasted Seasonal Vegetables
items.description: Seasonal veggies roasted with garlic and herbs.

items.description: Warm honey-sweet cornbread muffins, baked fresh.

items.name: Slow-Cooked Baked Beans
items.description: Smoky baked beans with bacon and molasses.

items.name: Classic Potato Salad
items.description: Creamy potato salad with celery, egg, and mustard.

items.description: Turkey, ham, roast beef, and veggie on artisan rolls. Cut into halves for easy grab-and-go.

items.description: Hummus, roasted peppers, and greens in spinach wraps.

items.description: Grilled chicken, romaine, parmesan, Caesar dressing.

items.name: Spinach & Artichoke Dip
items.description: Warm creamy spinach and artichoke dip with baguette slices and chips. Always a crowd favorite.

items.description: Jumbo wings tossed in buffalo, BBQ, or honey garlic. Crispy outside, juicy inside — 50 pieces.

items.name: Mini Meatball Bites

items.description: Seasonal vegetables with ranch and hummus dips.

items.description: Artisan cheeses with crackers, grapes, and honey.

items.name: Chocolate Brownie Tray
items.description: Fudgy chocolate brownies cut into generous squares.

items.name: Assorted Cookie Platter
items.description: Chocolate chip, oatmeal raisin, and sugar cookies baked fresh. Two dozen assorted treats.

items.name: Mini Cheesecakes
items.description: Individual NY-style cheesecakes with berry topping.

items.description: Berries, melon, grapes, and seasonal fruit arranged on a platter. Light, fresh finish — serves 15.

items.description: Fresh-squeezed lemonade by the gallon.

items.description: Southern-style sweet tea, brewed fresh.
